description: Extracts event details from flyers, posters, and announcements.

fields.name: date_and_time
fields.label: Date and time
fields.description: Date, start time, end time, or schedule.

fields.name: cost_or_registration
fields.label: Cost or registration
fields.description: Price, RSVP, registration link, or ticket details.

fields.name: contact_or_link
fields.label: Contact or link
fields.description: URL, QR code text, email, phone, or social handle.
